---
title: "Digital Marketing Projects"
---

# 🌸 Digital Marketing Projects

<div class="card">
  <h2>✨ Featured Projects</h2>
  <ul>
    <li><a href="projects/sample-marketing-project.qmd">Sample Marketing Project</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>

Below are selected projects showcasing my work in campaign strategy, content creation, and lifecycle marketing.

## ✨ Projects

-   [Sample Marketing Project](projects/sample-marketing-project.qmd)
-   (Add more as needed)
